docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR WITH, PETER DBA ACE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICES ASSIGNED TO PETER WITH DBA ACE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICES
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 757608 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WITH, PETER DBA ACE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CERVANTES, PATRICK IND & DBA BAYSHORE TOW
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO: PETER WITH DBA ACE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WITH, PETER DBA ACE JUDGMENT RECOVERY SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERVANTES, PATRICK IND & DBA BAYSHORE TOW $903.09 PRINCIPAL, $859.05 INTEREST, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,782.14, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE #757608, RENDERED AUGUST 07, 1996 IN SAN FRANCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $859.05 ACCRUED INTEREST, $20.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT CERVANTES, PATRICK IND & DBA BAYSHORE TOW
